name: Unreal AI Niagara
description: Niagara VFX tools for AI agents: list and inspect Niagara systems and spawn a Niagara component in the editor world.

tools.name: niagara-list-systems
tools.description: List every Niagara system asset in the project (Asset Registry; no asset loaded).

tools.name: niagara-get-system
tools.description: Inspect a single Niagara system (read-only): emitter count + per-emitter name/enabled.

tools.name: niagara-spawn-component
tools.description: Spawn a Niagara component for a system into the editor world at a location.

_comment: Install-catalog / compatibility manifest, shaped as ONE unreal-mcp-cli ExtensionDescriptor (cli/src/utils/extensions-catalog.ts) so it is directly liftable into the shared extensions.catalog.json { schemaVersion, extensions[] }. 'version' mirrors the .uplugin VersionName (kept in sync by commands/bump-version.ps1). 'minCoreVersion' is the lowest Unreal-MCP core version this extension supports (refreshed by commands/update-core.ps1). 'enginePlugins' are the gating engine plugins enabled in the .uproject alongside this extension. The install-extension resolver unions these with the materialized .uplugin Plugins[].
